description.en: Wrap yourself or an ally in renewal that slowly restores HP over several ticks — cheap to cast, gentle but steady.
description.cs: Obalí tebe nebo spojence obnovou, která několik tiků pomalu doplňuje HP — levné kouzlo s mírným, ale stálým účinkem.

no_target.self: you whisper a word of renewal and a faint shimmer settles over you.
no_target.others: {actor} whispers a word of renewal and a faint shimmer settles over them.

to_target.self: you whisper a word of renewal and a faint shimmer drifts to {target}.
to_target.others: {actor} whispers a word of renewal and a faint shimmer drifts to {target}.

no_target.self: zašeptáš kouzelné slovo a kolem tebe se usadí slabý třpyt.
no_target.others: {actor} zašeptá kouzelné slovo a kolem něj se usadí slabý třpyt.

to_target.self: zašeptáš kouzelné slovo a slabý třpyt se snese k {target}.
to_target.others: {actor} zašeptá kouzelné slovo a slabý třpyt se snese k {target}.
